title: Rise of the Footsoldier 3
original_title: Rise of the Footsoldier 3: The Pat Tate Story
overview: Notorious gangster, Pat Tate, rises through the ranks of Essex's criminal underworld. A prequel to the 'Rise of the Footsoldier' franchise.
